questions.question: Explain the time complexity for the brute force approach to solve the Travelling Salesman Problem using Exhaustive Search. Analyze its applicability in real-world scenarios.
questions.hint: Discuss the trade-off between time complexity and computational resources.

questions.question: What is the key difference between the brute force approach and a heuristic search algorithm for solving the Travelling Salesman Problem? Provide an example to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: Focus on the characteristics of brute force vs heuristic search methods.

questions.question: Assuming a city has 10 locations and the number of possible permutations is 3628800. What is the approximate time taken by an exhaustive search algorithm to find the optimal solution for the Travelling Salesman Problem, using a computer with 2 GHz processor and 4 GB RAM?
questions.hint: Use the given processor speed and RAM to estimate the time complexity.
